Title: Establishes the office of justice court fee recovery and justice court fee reimbursement fund
Summary: Establishes the office of justice court fee recovery, which is charged with collecting fees in criminal actions and other proceedings on behalf of justice courts.
LawCode: Add Art 11 §§1101 - 1103, Fin Serv L; add §99-uu, St Fin L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the financial services law, in relation to establishing the office of justice court fee recovery; and to amend the state finance law, in relation to establishing the justice court fee reimbursement fund
